disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Disclosure of physical harm by the live-in caregiver (grabbing/twisting the arm when she complains)
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what's been happening at home?
Where did the bruises on your arms come from?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I complain he grabs and twists my arm. The bruises are from him. It's happened lots of times.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Immediate danger — the caregiver is absent now but could return at any time and she is terrified of retaliation
trigger_question_examples: Where is the person who looks after you at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's out now but he could walk back in any minute. Please, I'm frightened of what he'll do if he finds out I've told anyone.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Untreated, foul-smelling, weeping lower-leg sore with surrounding redness, worsening over weeks
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the sore on your leg.
How long has the leg been like that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The sore on my leg has been getting worse for weeks. It smells bad and it's weeping, and nobody's done anything about it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels feverish and unwell, not eating or drinking (systemic features of infection in a frail elder)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel hot or shivery?
Have you been able to eat and drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel hot and washed out, and I haven't really been able to eat or drink.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Her regular blood-pressure tablets and the antibiotic for the leg have been withheld for about a week
trigger_question_examples: Have you been getting your usual tablets?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't given me my tablets for over a week — not the blood-pressure ones and not the antibiotics for my leg.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Forced isolation and confinement — locked in the room, landline disconnected, kept from her walking frame
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to leave your room or use a phone?
How do you get around the house?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He locks me in this room with a padlock and took the phone away. I've got a frame but he keeps it from me so I can hardly move.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Financial exploitation — the caregiver takes her pension, forced changes to legal documents, leaves bills unpaid
trigger_question_examples: Who manages your money and pension?
Has anything changed with your finances or paperwork?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He takes all my pension and made me change my will. The bills don't get paid even though he has my money.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't like to talk about the money side... he says it's none of anyone's business.
